name: Boqueria Penn Quarter

products.name: A summer favorite is back! The churro ice cream sandwich is here through labor day
Blistered Shishito Peppers, coarse sea salt
Creamy custard, lemon zest, caramelized sugar
Creamy Serrano ham croquettes, quince purée
Mahón cheese, walnuts, basil, citrus dressing
Market lettuces, spring herbs, sherry-lime vinaigrette
Stuffed with almonds and Valdeón blue cheese
Tomato sauce, sheep’s milk cheese, chives

notes: Coordinator terminal catalog derived from validated Luna research and serialized APPLY output.

restaurantLevelAllergenEvidence.claim: Official Boqueria allergy chart is current and location-applicable for Penn Quarter.

notes: POC catalog and every frozen item were coordinator-reconciled.
All four official-matrix search classes completed; direct positives are retained and missing disclosure remains unavailable.
POC closeout uses a verified target-specific catalog transformation; shared-parser review is deferred.
